# objectIDNotification()

**Instance Method**

Obtains a notification for use in merging the transaction’s changes into a managed object context.

## Declaration

```swift
func objectIDNotification() -> Notification
```

## Return Value

An `NSManagedObjectContextDidSaveObjectIDsNotification` notification.

## Discussion

To merge the relevant changes into your view context, first obtain a notification by calling `objectIDNotification()` on the transaction. Then, pass the notification to [doc://com.apple.coredata/documentation/CoreData/NSManagedObjectContext/mergeChanges(fromContextDidSave:)].
